01001.name: Roland Banks
01001.text:
[reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)
[elder_sign] effect: +1 for each clue on your location.

01006.name: Roland's .38 Special
01006.text: Roland Banks deck only. Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack (if there are 1 or more clues on your location, you get +3 [combat], instead). This attack deals +1 damage.

01017.name: Physical Training
01017.text:
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] for this skill test.
[fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] for this skill test.

01019.name: First Aid
01019.text:
Uses (3 supplies). If First Aid has no supplies, discard it.
[action] Spend 1 supply: Heal 1 damage or horror from an investigator at your location.

01020.name: Machete
01020.text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. If the attacked enemy is the only enemy engaged with you, this attack deals +1 damage.

01021.name: Guard Dog
01021.text: [reaction] When an enemy attack deals damage to Guard Dog: Deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.

01025.name: Vicious Blow
01025.text: If this skill test is successful during an attack, that attack deals +1 damage.

01039.name: Deduction
01039.text: If this skill test is successful while investigating a location, discover 1 additional clue at that location.

01090.name: Perception
01090.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01121a.name: Predator or Prey?
01121a.text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

01123.name: Uncovering the Conspiracy
01123.text: [action] The investigators spend 2 clues per investigator, as a group: Draw the top card of the Cultist deck. Objective - Find as many unique [[Cultist]] enemies as you can and add them to the victory display. If there are 6 unique [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display, advance. (Note: Not all 6 of them are in the Cultist deck.)

01124.name: Your House
01124.text: Forced - When the Ghoul Priest spawns: Spawn it here instead of at its normal location. [action]: Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource. (Limit once per turn.)

01129.name: Miskatonic University
01129.text: [action]: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for a [[Tome]] or [[Spell]] card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

01132.name: Easttown
01132.text: While you are in Easttown, reduce the cost of each [[Ally]] asset you play by 2.

01133.name: Graveyard
01133.text: Forced - After you enter the Graveyard: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must either take 2 horror or move to Rivertown.

01135.name: Hunting Shadow
01135.text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): Spend 1 clue or take 2 damage.

01138.name: Herman Collins
01138.text: Spawn - Graveyard. [action] Choose and discard 4 cards from your hand: Parley. Add Herman Collins to the victory display.

01172.name: Hunting Nightgaunt
01172.text:
Hunter.
While attempting to evade Hunting Nightgaunt, double the negative modifier of each revealed chaos token.

50028.name: Northside
50028.text: [action]: Move to any [[Arkham]] location. (Limit once per game.)

events.message: After 'campaign next' creates a new run (run 3) and sets .current_run to it, the 'state' and 'do' commands WITHOUT --run still resolve to the previous run (run 2, which is already GAME OVER). Reproduced: .current_run = c-show-hy3-roland-3, but bare 'state' printed the midnight_masks (run 2) board, and bare 'do 1' returned run 2's GAME OVER. Workaround: pass --run <full path> to every command. The new run's files (hidden.blob, state.json) are correctly written.

steps.status: [R3·Investigation a2/3 | Roland Banks 01001 | Graveyard | clu0 res4 | dmg3/9 hor5/5 | h1 d26 x6 | Act1 Agd1 doom2/6]
